Defendants Destination Big Bear, Llc And Patrick Earley?S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set One, And Request For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $2,860.00
Off Calendar Sep-30-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom:
Atty. Shanna Burkholder, Esq. of P.K. Schrieffer LLP (Tel. 909.238.5202) for defendants;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS PATRICK EARLEY, DESTINATION BIG BEAR, LLC'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set One, And Request For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $2,860.00.

Ms. Burkholder stipulates to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. All appearances are via Zoom, the stipulation will be signed by the clerk on behalf of counsel and the judge pro tem.

Ms. Burkholder provides brief argument regarding the issue of sanctions.

At the conclusion of argument, the tentative ruling is adopted as modified as to the issues of sanctions: No opposition filed. Motion granted. Responses to be served by October 14, 2022. Sanctions are to be awarded for each motion in an amount to be determined by the Court.

At the request of the judge pro tem, Ms. Burkholder is to prepare a single proposed order for the ruling on all four motions. A copy of the proposed order is to be sent to the plaintiff. The proposed order is to state the substantive portion of the tentative ruling for all four motions and should also include the added language regarding sanctions as set forth on the record by the judge pro tem. Ms. Burkholder is to email the order to Judge Pro Tem David McDonald at: davididaho14@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Court Reporter: Justus Balentine via Zoom, CSR #13859, Tel. 714.471.2597, Email: justusbalentinecsr@gmail.com. (302/JPT)
